url.description:
A URL or URL template specifying where the results shall be accessed. Supported formats:
  • a valid Google Cloud Storage URL, e.g. `gs://my-bucket/some-folder`. A subdirectory will be created for this async process request, named after the request ID, and output files will be stored there. This is equivalent to the template `gs://my-bucket/some-folder//`.
  • a templated Google Cloud Storage URL, e.g. `gs://my-bucket/some-folder/`. Templating allows custom organization of the output files. Templates can contain the following placeholders, which are replaced by respective actual values when writing results:
    • `` - the ID of your async process request,
    • `` - the output of the async request.
    If the request is not templated `/` will be used as default.

credentials.description: Base64-encoded service account credentials in JSON format.
